actions.subject: Q2 estimates — need your sign-off

Hi Ryan,

Thanks for sending these over. I've reviewed the Q2 estimates and they look good to me — signed off.

Let me know if anything else is needed before you finalise.

Rob

actions.subject: UCC lien — Ebony Adams account

actions.draft:
Hi,

Thanks for flagging. Please hold disbursements on that account while we review. I'll look into the filing and come back to you with next steps shortly.

Rob

actions.draft:
Hi,

Happy to complete the verification. Please send the link or let me know what's needed and I'll action it today.

Rob

Hey Meredith,

Yes, I'll be there! See you tonight.

Roby

actions.subject: Head of Finance — agency candidate profiles

actions.draft: Hey Dom, sorry for the slow reply. Agreed the one you flagged looks strongest. Happy to do a first screen — can you set it up? Would pass on the others for now.

Thanks for these — I'll work through the steps today and come back to you once each one is done.

Rob

Happy to help with your review. Could you outline the specific transactions or time period you're looking at? I'll pull the relevant information and come back to you promptly.

Rob

Rob
